messages: {"parts":[{"content":"lets develop our own /frontend skill that can be deployed flexibly to generate hgih quality landing pages and websites based on varying degrees of seed input and content (from the prompters' thoughts to quotes or color swatches and images for inspiration) along with the actual content of the page. \\\n\\\nI also want us to be able to aesthetically capture the style and techniqutes of the best pages we create so we can do that reliably (basically turn them into templates)","timestamp":"2026-02-06T20:18:32.989292Z","part_kind":"user-prompt"}],"timestamp":null,"instructions":"","kind":"request","run_id":null,"metadata":null}
